title: Spicy Fluffy Cashew Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish featuring a blend of spicy flavors with a touch of tanginess from rice vinegar, served as a flavorful snack that's perfect for those who enjoy crispy textures.
instructions: Chop the cashews into small pieces.
Place chopped cashews, chili flakes, sesame seeds, rice vinegar, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and a pinch of salt in a mixing bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Add the cashew mixture into the hot air fryer basket, making sure not to overcrowd it.
Cook for about 8-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on all sides. Shake the basket halfway through cooking.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
